t_ch: …我还有别的选择？
t_en: ...I have other choices?

t_ch: 当然。我尊崇自由意志，谜题的意义应当由解谜的人决定，就是你——
t_en: Of course. I respect free will. The meaning of the puzzle should be decided by the one who solves it, which is you...

t_ch: 我还是要进入心境空间。
t_en: I still want to enter the Emoscape.

t_ch: …那我要看你自己修自己！
t_en: ...Then I want to see you fix yourself!

t_ch: 没问题。瞧好，游客！
t_en: No problem. Watch this, guest!

t_ch: 伴随着一阵悦耳的咬合音，面前的迷钟不再冒出黑烟与火花。
t_en: With a series of pleasant clicks, the Ticker in front of you stops emitting smoke and sparks.

t_ch: 滴答。故障修复了，我的心魔也消散得无影无踪！
t_en: Tick-tock. The fault has been fixed. My inner demon has been completely vanquished!

t_ch: ——来自迷钟的赞许，游客！
t_en: ...A nod of approval from the ticker, guest!

t_ch: 现在想来，我只需要有人能给出答案，不论是哪种观点，我都能用以坚定自己的路！
t_en: Now that I think of it, I just need someone to give an answer — no matter the perspective, I can use it to ascertain my own path!

t_ch: 回见！游客！我要去派对潇洒了！等你与我的两位同伴结识，再来找我们！
t_en: See you again, guest! I'm going to go live it up at the party! Look for us again when you rendezvous with my two friends!

t_ch: 滴答！这叫摆脚开手舞！游客！这绝对会流行！
t_en: Tick-tock! This is the boogie-woogie! Guest! This will go viral for sure!

t_ch: 哈哈哈，解开心结后的感觉可真棒！等你与我的两位同伴结识，再来找我们！
t_en: Hahaha, the feeling of untangled emotions is exhilarating! Come look for me again when you rendezvous with my two friends!

t_ch: 滴答！这叫摆脚开手舞！游客！这绝对会流行！
t_en: Tick-tock! This is the boogie-woogie! Guest! This will go viral for sure!

t_ch: 你好啊，游客！欢迎来到折纸大学，如果不知道该往哪儿走，我可以给你指路！
t_en: Hello, guest! Welcome to Paperfold University. If you don't know where to go, I can point the way for you!

t_ch: 哎呀，不好意思，突然搭话是不是把你吓了一跳？放心，我是志愿者！
t_en: Ah, sorry, did I startle you with my sudden interjection? Don't worry. I'm a volunteer!

t_ch: 不瞒你说，这两天来大学参观的人实在是太多，负责引导的同学一个个都忙不过来，于是我就站这了。
t_en: To be honest, there have been too many visitors at the college these few days. The student guides have been overwhelmed, which is why I'm standing here.

t_ch: …你没坏？
t_en: ...You're not broken?

t_ch: 哈哈，你可真会开玩笑，坏掉什么的…说得就好像我是个迷钟一样。
t_en: Haha, you've got jokes. What's this about being broken... You make it sound like I'm a Ticker.

t_ch: 直接把奖励给我吧。
t_en: Just give me the prize.

t_ch: 奖励？校庆有这种活动吗…不好意思，交班的同学没讲，具体我也不太了解……
t_en: Prize? Does the school celebration have such an event... Sorry, the student who handed over to me didn't brief me, so I'm not too sure on the details...

t_ch: 你是学生？
t_en: You're a student?

t_ch: 对啊？咦…难道看着不像？我有那么与众不同吗？
t_en: Yeah? Err... Do I not look like one? Am I really that different?

t_ch: 话说回来…都到这个点了，交班的人哪去了？还得等多久啊，真遭不住。
t_en: Anyway... Just look at the time. Where's my replacement gone to? How long is it going to take? I really can't take much more of this.

t_ch: 游客，要不…我来给你占个卜？
t_en: How about... I do some divination on you?

t_ch: 没活不用硬找的。
t_en: You don't have to look for work where there's none.

t_ch: 这不是无聊嘛！
t_en: I'm just bored!

t_ch: 太麻烦了吧？
t_en: Is it too much trouble?

t_ch: 不用和我客气的，游客！保证不收取任何费用！
t_en: No need to be polite! I won't charge a single penny!

t_ch: 好啦好啦，来，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
t_en: All right, all right. Come, welcome to the Calmscape...

t_ch: 你是不是写错字了？
t_en: Did you get a word wrong?

t_ch: 跟先前的不太一样啊？
t_en: Seems a little different from before?

t_ch: 有吗？我的占卜室从来都叫这个名字…啊，你该不会还以为我是个迷钟吧？
t_en: Did I? I've always called my divination room by this name... Ah, you didn't still think I was a Ticker, did you?

t_ch: 再来一次，欢迎光临「心静空间」——
t_en: Once more, welcome to the Calmscape...

t_ch: 进入「心静空间」。
t_en: Enter the Calmscape.

t_ch: 如何，游客？对占卜流程还满意吗？
t_en: How about it? Were you satisfied with the divination experience?

t_ch: 根据你的选择，我能解读出你未来的运势。总之，让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
t_en: According to your choice, I can read your future fortune. Anyway, let's see... This omen means...

t_ch: 让我瞧瞧…这种预兆代表着——
t_en: Let's see... This omen means...

t_ch: 「努力固然重要，但若是精神紧绷，不妨休息一下」
t_en: "Working hard is important, but if your nerves are tense, how about taking a break?"

t_ch: …道理谁都懂，但哪有人真敢休息啊。希望能帮上你的忙，游客！
t_en: ...This is common sense, but who really dares take a break? I hope this helps, guest!

t_ch: 「美好的愿望会实现，只需要努力到自己认可的程度，再加上一个小小的契机。」
t_en: "Wonderful wishes will be realized, as long as you work hard to a degree that you can accept, along with a little opportunity."

t_ch: 看起来不错哦！游客！能实现就好啦！
t_en: Doesn't sound too bad! It's fine as long as you realize it!

t_ch: 「宜创想，宜冥思。」
t_en: "Suitable for creative thinking and rumination."

t_ch: 哇，是个不错的结果！上次有学生占卜出这个，两三天就把毕业设计做出来了！
t_en: Woah, a decent result! A student got this result previously, and then knocked out his graduation design within days!

t_ch: 不知道能不能帮上你的忙，游客！
t_en: I wonder if this will help you, guest!

t_ch: 「诸事顺利。」
t_en: "All things will be smooth-sailing."

t_ch: ——所有事都会顺利诶！恭喜你，这是非常好的结果！游客！笑一个笑一个！
t_en: ...Everything will go smoothly! Congrats, this is an excellent result, guest! Smile!

t_ch: 「好耶。」
t_en: "Aw right."

t_ch: 它说「好耶」…不管怎么样，总之…好耶！
t_en: It said: "Yay." ... Whatever the case... Yay!

t_ch: 不是，别用这种眼神看我！释义手册上就是这么写的！
t_en: Wait, don't look at me with those eyes! That's what's written in the manual!

t_ch: 希…希望你能满意，游客…啊哈哈……
t_en: I... I hope you are satisfied, guest... Ahaha...

t_ch: …你的占卜结果就是这样了，对运势不满意的话，还有重来的机会哦？
t_en: ...That's it for your divination result. If you're not happy with your fortune, would you like another chance?

t_ch: 进入「心静空间」。
t_en: Enter the Calmscape.

t_ch: 我已经玩够了。
t_en: I'm done.

t_ch: 嗯，你开心就好！顺便，刚才占卜的时候，交班的人发消息说他掉进喷泉里了。
t_en: Sure, as long as you're happy! Also, during the divination, the replacement student sent a message saying that he fell into the fountain.

t_ch: 这借口听着挺安全的，所以就不等他了。谢谢你陪我打发时间！
t_en: This excuse sounds pretty safe, so I won't be waiting for him. Thank you for spending time with me!

t_ch: 我就…先去舞池里找我的那两个朋友！等大家聚齐了，记得来和我们玩！
t_en: I will... head to the dance floor and look for my two friends! When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!

t_ch: 很独特的「修复」方式…不是吗？
t_en: It's a unique method of "repair"... Don't you think?

t_ch: 你见过许多出故障的迷钟。对，我们是有些不对劲，被古怪的积木影响了心智。但我们同样拥有自主意识，在无止境的梦中活着，并不断适应。
t_en: You have met many malfunctioning Tickers in your time. Indeed, we may be a little off, our minds have been affected by strange building blocks. But, we still have our own consciousness. We live inside the endless dream and constantly adapt.

t_ch: 滴答，该选哪个呢？
t_en: Tick-tock, which one should I pick?

t_ch: 所以…会不会哪天，我们不再有「故障」，甚至都不再是「迷钟」？
t_en: So... Maybe one day, we will no longer be "malfunctioning." Perhaps, there will come a time when we are not even "Tickers"?

t_ch: 我在说些什么？肯定是哪搞错了…狠狠敲两下…这次对了！正确的释义应该是——
t_en: What am I talking about? There must be something wrong... I'll just give this a good whack... There we go! The correct interpretation should be—

t_ch: 游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
t_en: Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!

t_ch: 好多人，我的两个朋友在哪呢…等大家都到齐了，记得要来找我们玩啊！
t_en: So many people, where are my friends... When everyone's gathered, don't forget to hang out with us!

t_ch: 游客！这里好热闹啊！我都看不到自己的脚了！
t_en: Guest! It's so crowded here! I can't even see my own feet!

t_ch: 滴答，你来了，游客。
t_en: Tick-tock, you're here, guest.

t_ch: 我可以想象，把我们三个都找齐的过程一定无比艰辛。
t_en: I can imagine the ordeal it must be to gather the three of us together.

t_ch: 有好好享受派对吗？要不要喝点苏乐达？
t_en: Are you enjoying the party? Want some SoulGlad?

t_ch: 你们是我见过的最怪的迷钟。
t_en: You're all the weirdest Tickers I've seen in my life.

t_ch: 好。
t_en: Alright.

t_ch: 对。
t_en: Yes.

t_ch: 我不是迷钟，别搞混啦。
t_en: I'm not a Ticker. Don't get it confused.

t_ch: 听说，在我们之前，也有许多迷钟被修复，得以继续完成他们的使命。
t_en: I hear that before us, there were also many Tickers that were fixed, so that they could continue to fulfill their duties.

t_ch: 而这毫无疑问是游客的功绩！值得被用力称赞！
t_en: And it was no doubt completely thanks to your effort! You must be profusely lauded!

t_ch: 所以咱们就商量了一下，得给游客你送点东西当做纪念，这可是特意拜托谐乐学院的教授设计的，非常有收藏价值！
t_en: So after we discussed it, we just had to give you a little something as a souvenir. We specially asked a Charmony Academy professor to design this. It makes for a great collectible!

t_ch: 多亏你的努力，以后出故障的迷钟想必会越来越少吧。希望游客你不会觉得寂寞！
t_en: All thanks to your hard work, I'm sure there will be fewer faulty Tickers in the future. I hope you won't feel too lonely then!

t_ch: 滴答，无谓的伤感罢了，反正我们还要在这跳很久的舞，很久…很久！
t_en: Tick-tock, just feeling unnecessarily sad, is all. In any case, we're still going to keep dancing here for a long time, a very... very long time!

t_ch: 总之呢——
t_en: In any case...

t_ch: 咱们不是钟表小子，没法施展动画里的「钟表戏法」，就只能用这种方式来传达啦！
t_en: We're not Clockie, nor can we perform any of his Clockwork tricks in the cartoons, so we can only express our feelings through this method!

t_ch: 希望你玩得开心！游客！
t_en: I hope you have lots of fun, guest!

t_ch: 有缘再见！别忘了和我们共同相处的快乐——这，就是，「梦境迷钟」！
t_en: May we meet again! Don't forget the great times we spent together — this, is, the Dream Ticker!

t_ch: 等等，都说了我不是啊！
t_en: Hang on, I already said I'm not one!

t_ch: 滴、滴、答答答答滴、滴…
t_en: Tick, tick, tocktocktocktock tick, tick...

t_ch: 滴答，热诚空气！
t_en: Tick-tock, warm air!

t_ch: 我最擅长机械舞了！
t_en: I'm awesome at doing the robot!

t_ch: 嘀、答…*又*见面了，宾客。这是我与你的第几百次相遇了呢？
t_en: Tick... tock... We meet again, dear guest. How many times have we danced this dance? Hundreds?

t_ch: 每一次，为了修好我，你都会回拨我的表针，将表盘处理得光亮如新。
t_en: Every time, you would turn back my clock hands and polish the dial until it shone to fix me.

t_ch: 而每一次表针被回拨，我都将跌下时间的螺旋，让你修好过我的事实被抹去，让我再度损毁。
t_en: And every time the clock hands are rewound, I would tumble down time's spiral, undoing and erasing your deed, and becoming undone once more.

t_ch: 来吧，被命运选中的匠人，请再一次修好我！
t_en: Come then, fate's chosen tinkerer. Please fix me one more time!

t_ch: 进入心境空间。
t_en: Enter the Emoscape.

t_ch: 这家伙在说什么呢？
t_en: What's this fellow on about?

t_ch: 你还没有觉悟吗…我知道你会这么说，毕竟我已经历过无数次。
t_en: Don't you understand?... I knew you'd say that, because I've been through this too many times.

t_ch: 下次见吧，终有一日……
t_en: See you next time. One day, one day...

t_ch: 嘀答，希望宾客不要介意迷钟正值青春期时的胡言乱语…真丢人，好想找个地方钻进去。
t_en: Tick-tock. I hope you don't mind the self-indulgent nonsense of a teenage Ticker... This is so embarrassing. I want to crawl into a hole and disappear.

t_ch: 不过，我们其实没办法证明，被抹去的存在是真是假，不是吗？这些给你，忘了我吧。
t_en: But we can't exactly prove that something erased ever existed in the first place, can we? Here, take these, and forget me.

t_ch: 嘀、答…我知道，你是来处理残党的…呵，当初加入「业务组」的时候，我就想象过这个瞬间，却没想到它来得如此突兀。
t_en: Tick... tock... I know the drill. You're here for the clean-up, heh... I knew this day would come the moment I signed up to be a part of the "Business Team." I just didn't expect it to come so soon.

t_ch: 动手吧，我还没有落魄到因为区区损毁，就背叛迷钟「老大」的程度。
t_en: Just do it then. I've enough integrity left in me not to be a snitch to Boss Ticker over some petty damage.

t_ch: 进入心境空间。
t_en: Enter the Emoscape.

t_ch: 嘀答，这是…我的身体回到了全盛期？
t_en: Tick tock. Is this... my body returning to its prime?

t_ch: 受、受您照顾了，这份恩情，阿钟会永远记得。
t_en: Th-Thank you for taking care of me. I, Ticky, will never forget your kindness.

t_ch: 迷钟「老大」，看来我还能再为您效力一阵，我这就回去打卡上班。
t_en: Looks like this Ticker hasn't run outta time yet, Boss. I'm heading back and clocking in for work.

t_ch: 嘀、答…宾客，你可一定要帮帮我，我的表盘里被塞进了一块可憎的积木！
t_en: Tick... tock... Oh dear guest, please, you must help me. Some wretched block is stuck inside my dial!

t_ch: 迷钟会被积木操纵，连思想都会被改变，多么可怕啊！不行，快帮我，我连一秒都忍受不了了！
t_en: The block manipulates the Ticker, even altering our thoughts! Oh, what a terrible fate! Please, you must save me, I won't suffer this a second longer!

t_ch: 进入心境空间。
t_en: Enter the Emoscape.

t_ch: 嘀答，我怎么会忘掉呢？我其实最喜欢积木了！被积木改变的状态真让人流连忘返啊！
t_en: Tick tock, how did I forget? I actually love blocks the most! I yearn and chase after that altered state...

t_ch: 但毕竟是我自己要求的，所以这些给你作为报酬！现在我要再去找一块积木塞回去啦！
t_en: ...But I did ask for this, didn't I? So here's your reward! And now I'm off to find another block to fill that void!

t_ch: 这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光——但不是现在。
t_en: The surface of this dummy is covered in dark wrinkles. Perhaps there will come a time when it shines brightly... But that time is not now.

t_ch: 这座人台表面布满了暗淡的纹路。或许在某个时刻，它会焕发出流光。
t_en: This dummy is covered in dark patterns. Perhaps it will shine with light at some moment.

t_ch: 你想起自己在奥赫玛也见到过这样的人台，说不定它现在发生了变化？你应该再去看看。
t_en: You remember seeing such a dummy in Okhema. Maybe it has changed now? You should go check it out again.

t_ch: 仿佛受到某种引导般，褔坛自顾自地播放着泰坦的符号。
t_en: As though guided by something, the Altar of Blessings plays the Titan's symbol on its own.

t_ch: 触碰这座人台时，阿格莱雅的声音从里面传出，让你不自觉哆嗦了一下。
t_en: As you touch the mannequin, Aglaea's voice emanates from within, causing you to shudder involuntarily.

t_ch: 无需惊慌，贵客，这座人台是我的「衣匠」。我将一部分神性赐给了它，使其能够如活物般行动。
t_en: No need to panic, my distinguished guest. This mannequin is my "Garmentmaker." I have granted it a portion of my divinity so that it can take action like a living being.

t_ch: 有时我会以它为裁衣的模特。若有必要，它也可以代行公务或上阵御敌。
t_en: Sometimes I use it as a model for tailoring clothes. If necessary, it can also carry out official duties or engage in battle.

t_ch: 我懂了，是黑塔小人！
t_en: I see. It's like the miniature Hertas!

t_ch: 虽然不知你所指的是什么，但这种操使傀儡的手段确实算不上独特。你能理解就好。
t_en: Though I'm not sure what you mean, I agree this method of controlling puppets isn't exactly unique. As long as you understand, that's enough.

t_ch: 所以，是你本人在说话？
t_en: So, it's you speaking?

t_ch: 是的，衣匠可代我在各个场合传递言语，如此也省去了与人争吵的麻烦。
t_en: Yes, the Garmentmaker can convey my words in various situations, which saves me the trouble of arguing with others.

t_ch: 衣匠大军，踏平奥赫玛！
t_en: The army of Garmentmakers will trample Okhema!

t_ch: 呵呵，可惜我的神性并不能分成那么多份，而且我也没理由毁掉自己守护的城邦。
t_en: Hehe, unfortunately, my divinity cannot be divided into so many pieces, and I have no reason to destroy the city I protect.

t_ch: 人台并没有对你的打扰表示不满——它根本没有能做出表情的脸。但突然降临的沉默告诉你，或许是时候离开了。
t_en: The mannequin doesn't express displeasure at your interruption — it doesn't have a face capable of making expressions. But the sudden silence tells you that perhaps it's time to leave.

t_ch: 贵客，请先别着急离开，我还有话要说。
t_en: My distinguished guest, please don't rush to leave yet. I still have something to say.

t_ch: 你会读心术？
t_en: Can you read minds?

t_ch: 仅限我们被金丝相连时。你早就亲自体验过了，不是吗？
t_en: Only when we are connected by the golden thread. You've experienced it personally before, haven't you?

t_ch: 实际上，最近我正为一件事而苦恼。如果你愿意伸出援手，我会非常感激。这是真话。
t_en: In fact, I've been troubled by something recently. If you are willing to lend a hand, I would be very grateful. This is the truth.

t_ch: 我不是故意碰这东西的！
t_en: I didn't mean to touch this thing!

t_ch: 我没有怪罪你的意思，只是有件事要请你帮忙…即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
t_en: I'm not blaming you. I just have something to ask for your help with... Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.

t_ch: 刚才怎么不说？
t_en: Why didn't you say this before?

t_ch: 我有件事需要你帮忙，刚才在斟酌如何开口是好。即使现在我们没有被金丝相连，我也想向你传达我的真诚。
t_en: There's something I need your help with. I was just pondering how to start. Even though we're not currently connected by the golden thread, I want to convey my sincerity to you.

t_ch: 就在奥赫玛遭受入侵前不久，我得到了一些预言。可惜那会儿诸事缠身，一直没空关注它。
t_en: Not long before Okhema was invaded, I received some prophecies. Unfortunately, I was too busy to pay attention to them at the time.

t_ch: 最近，我试图解读这些预言，发现它被一股未知的力量遮蔽了起来，仅凭我自己无法解开。所以，我需要你的协助……
t_en: I've tried to interpret these prophecies recently and discovered they were obscured by an unknown force, which I can't unravel alone. Therefore, I need your assistance...

t_ch: 需要我来发电吗？
t_en: Do you need me to generate electricity?

t_ch: 虽然你确实得到了欧洛尼斯的祝福，不过在这件事上，恐怕我们得求助于其他泰坦的眷属。
t_en: While you indeed received Oronyx's blessing, I'm afraid we must seek the help of the other Titans' kin in this matter.

t_ch: 别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
t_en: Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.

t_ch: 乐意效劳。
t_en: I'm happy to help.

t_ch: 谢谢，这对我和奥赫玛都意义重大——别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
t_en: Thank you. This is very important for me and Okhema. Don't worry. I'll help you throughout the process and share what I interpret.

t_ch: 你手下没有其他能找的人吗？
t_en: Don't you have anyone else you can ask?

t_ch: 诚如你所说，我确实有些可靠的帮手，但他们大都身负元老院的公务——在这个节骨眼上，我必须避免节外生枝。
t_en: As you said, I do have some reliable helpers, but most are burdened with duties from the Council of Elders — at this critical moment, I must avoid unnecessary complications.

t_ch: 别担心，我会全程协助你，并把解读后的内容与你分享。
t_en: Don't worry. I will assist you throughout the process and share the interpreted content with you.

t_ch: 简单来说，我需要你帮忙搜集一种名叫「创生若虫」的生物。它们怀有泰坦的赐福，可以帮助我解读这些预言。
t_en: In simple terms, I need you to help collect a type of creatures called "Creation Nymphs." They possess the Titans' blessings and can aid me in interpreting these prophecies.

t_ch: 「创生若虫」？
t_en: Creation Nymphs?

t_ch: 于纷争世，{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}因意外失去了神体。{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}无法接受爱人负伤的事实，便搜集瑟希斯四散的身躯，意图用丝线将其收拢、令它回归。
t_en: In the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} accidentally lost their divine form. {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, unable to accept the fact that their lover was injured, collected Cerces' scattered bodies, intending to weave them together with threads to bring the other Titan back.

t_ch: 二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。
t_en: The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.

t_ch: 拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。
t_en: Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."

t_ch: 只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
t_en: But this act... is destined to be futile.

t_ch: 信息量有点大…
t_en: Information overload...

t_ch: 你只需要把见到的若虫带回来，剩下的交给我就好，贵客。
t_en: All you need to do is bring back any nymphs you encounter, and I'll handle the rest, distinguished guest.

t_ch: 在捕捉它们的过程中，你可能会看到一些难以理解的现象。不用担心，那只是它们留下的残影而已。
t_en: During the process of capturing them, you may witness some phenomena that are hard to comprehend. Don't worry. Those are merely the remnants they leave behind.

t_ch: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
t_en: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

t_ch: 我拜托某只熟识的若虫设下了一个练手小谜题，贵客不妨先试着解开它——这对解读预言也有好处。
t_en: I've asked my trusted nymph to prepare a small puzzle for practice. Why not give it a try, my esteemed guest? It may prove useful in unraveling future prophecies.

t_ch: 那么，请听好：<color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
t_en: So, listen carefully. <color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>

t_ch: 去寻找它的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
t_en: Seek out its hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.

t_ch: <color=#dbc291ff>「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」</color>
t_en: <color=#dbc291ff>"Created by Cerces, yet bound by the string of romance. If you touch its roots, you can create a knot of destiny."</color>

t_ch: 去寻找那位织者的藏身之处吧，我在那里为你准备了一份礼物。
t_en: Seek out that weaver's hidden place — I've left a gift there, just for you.

t_ch: 交互行为已确认，即将播放预置语音……
t_en: Interaction confirmed. Pre-set voice lines are playing...

t_ch: 不错嘛，贵客，你比我想象中更擅长这项活动。
t_en: Not bad, my distinguished guest. You're more skilled at this than I imagined.

t_ch: 为方便你搜集，我提前在若虫可能出没的区域布设了多台「衣匠」。很贴心，不是吗？现在你也有访问它们的权限了。
t_en: To facilitate your collection, I've set up multiple Garmentmakers in areas where the larvae are likely to appear. Pretty thoughtful, right? Now you have access to them as well.

t_ch: 期待你的好消息，贵客。再次感谢你的协助。
t_en: I'm looking forward to your good news, my distinguished guest. Thanks again for your assistance.

t_ch: 在奥赫玛，若虫们以蝴蝶的样貌存在。它们身上的「浪漫」气息非比寻常，应该不难分辨。
t_en: In Okhema, the nymphs exist in the form of butterflies. The aura of "Romance" oozing from them is unusual, and should not be difficult to distinguish.

t_ch: 等搜集到足够的若虫后，再回来找我吧，贵客。
t_en: Esteemed guest, return to me once you have gathered enough nymphs.

t_ch: 你触碰这棵树的根须，一只落有蝴蝶的宝箱随之显形。
t_en: You touch the roots of the tree, where a treasure chest upon which a butterfly had landed appears.

t_ch: 好棒嗡！根本难不倒你嗡…难道你是天才嗡？
t_en: Excellent like a butterfly! This puzzle isn't a walk in the park... Are you a genius?

t_ch: 这是阿格莱雅女士留给你的奖励，我要回到她身边去了嗡。
t_en: Here's the reward from Lady Aglaea! I'm going back to her now.

t_ch: 说起来，之前在浴场见到过一个奇怪的人台，不知道它还在不在……
t_en: Speaking of which, I saw a strange mannequin at the baths. I wonder if it's still there...

t_ch: 这座人台表面满是暗淡的纹路，显然已经被弃置于此许久了。在你触碰它的一瞬，阵阵流光重新焕发而出。
t_en: This mannequin is covered in dimmed patterns. It has obviously been left here for a long while. At the moment you touched it, streams of light radiated once more.

t_ch: ……嘎吱…██……重新启动中……
t_en: ...Rearrrr... ██... Restarting...

t_ch: 失去了金丝牵引的人台吐出不成词句的话语。那声音好似阿格莱雅，却又有着细微的区别，仿佛经过多次转录的《钟表小子第一季》。
t_en: Without the pull of the golden thread, the mannequin sputters incomprehensible phrases. The voice sounds a bit like Aglaea, but there is also a subtle difference, as if an over-copied version of Clockie Season 1.

t_ch: 搜集若虫…继续…必须……
t_en: Collect nymphs... Continue... Must...

t_ch: 人台重新陷入了沉寂，但体表的光芒并没有消散。也许它意外地被你修好了？
t_en: The mannequin fell silent once more. However, the radiance on its surface didn't dissipate. Perhaps you managed to fix it.

t_ch: 我从预言中得到了提示…但好像并不完整？
t_en: I got a hint from the prophecy... But it seems incomplete?

t_ch: 其他部分会在哪里呢？这里已经没有更多预言了…
t_en: Where are the other parts? There aren't any more prophecies here...

t_ch: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
t_en: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
t_en: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者对泰坦之间的秘密颇具兴趣。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>壁画中的卷轴上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is rather interested in the secrets between Titans. The golden thread brings tidings: It has hidden itself <color=#dbc291ff>in a scroll within a wall painting</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者热衷于修复旧日的残垣。金丝带来消息，它正趴在一根<color=#dbc291ff>断裂的石柱上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is passionately restoring the remnants of the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is lying on a <color=#dbc291ff>broken stone pillar</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者无畏亦或无知，竟主动向黑潮发起了挑战。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>残留着黑潮影响的桥上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver, undaunted and unwitting, has issued a challenge to the black tide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located <color=#dbc291ff>on a bridge mired in black tide remnants</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者试图窥见泰坦的真容。金丝带来消息，它正潜伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一座神像的头部</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is attempting to spy on the Titans' true form. The golden thread brings tidings: It has infiltrated <color=#dbc291ff>the head of a divine statue</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者十分虔诚，仍试图倾听众神的指引。金丝带来消息，它正位于一座<color=#dbc291ff>神龛前…的石柱下</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is devout, still attempting to heed the gods' guidance. The golden thread brings tidings: It is located at a <color=#dbc291ff>column... in front of a shrine</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…比起未来，有位织者更注重当下的生活。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>趴在一面墙上</color>悠闲地打发时间呢，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is more concerned with their present than future. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>lying on a wall</color>, leisurely whiling time away. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者格外称职，执意要完成被托付的任务。金丝带来消息，它正在努力<color=#dbc291ff>支撑一座天平</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is upholding their utmost duty, insistent on completing the mission entrusted to them. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hard at work <color=#dbc291ff>propping up a scale</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者不够小心，爬到了远超自身能力的高度。金丝带来消息，它正吊在<color=#dbc291ff>天平一侧的托盘底下</color>呢，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver accidentally climbed to a height beyond its own ken. The golden thread brings tidings: It is hanging from <color=#dbc291ff>a plate on one side of a scale</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者童心未泯，喜欢扮演勇士的引导者。金丝带来消息，它正<color=#dbc291ff>藏在房间角落</color>、等待着勇士打开宝箱呢，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver is young at heart, pretend-playing at being a warrior's guide. The golden thread brings tidings: It is <color=#dbc291ff>hiding in the corner of a room</color>, waiting for a brave adventurer to open the chest. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者文采斐然，又对过往颇为留恋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>荒野的枯树下</color>吟诗，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... a weaver conjures magic in its writing, nostalgic for the past. The golden thread brings tidings: It is reciting poetry <color=#dbc291ff>beneath a withered tree in the wilds</color>. Go look for it there.

t_ch: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
t_en: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
t_en: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

t_ch: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
t_en: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

t_ch: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
t_en: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

t_ch: 让我看看…「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
t_en: Let's see... "In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."

t_ch: 果然是预言的晦涩行文，恐怕要花些时间才能将其解明…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
t_en: As expected, an obscure scribble of a prophecy that may yet take time to decipher... If you are interested, you might be inclined to interpret it.

t_ch: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
t_en: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

t_ch: 能复述下预言的内容吗？
t_en: Can you repeat the prophecy?

t_ch: 「在夜之瑕玷，光所不能触碰的地方，长龙击碎了神殿，只留下不熄的火光」。
t_en: "In the blemish of the night, wherein reach not the dawnlight, the Makrodrakon struck the temple, leaving flames untemperable."

t_ch: 依我看，这应该是对某个地点的暗示。那里或许存在什么值得注意的东西……
t_en: The way I see it, this should be a clue about a certain location. There may be something worth paying attention to there...

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to my duties.

t_ch: 再见，期待你的好消息。
t_en: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: Not for you~

t_ch: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
t_en: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人的思维无法同时解读两条预言。」
t_en: Thank you, dear customer. However, a wise sage once said: "A human mind cannot solve two prophecies at once."

t_ch: 眼下我们手头已经有一则预言了。在处理完它之前，其他预言的解读就暂且搁置吧。
t_en: We are already working on one prophecy. We must put any other prophecies to the side for now while we work on this one.

t_ch: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
t_en: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

t_ch: 我想再多知道些细节。
t_en: I want to know more details.

t_ch: 好啊，知无不言。
t_en: Sure. Ask away.

t_ch: 若虫是什么？
t_en: What's a nymph?

t_ch: 于纷争世，{RUBY_B#「理性」之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}因意外失去了神体。{RUBY_B#「浪漫」之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}无法接受爱人负伤的事实，便搜集瑟希斯四散的身躯，意图用丝线将其收拢、令它回归。
t_en: In the Era Bellica, {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#} accidentally lost their divine form. {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#}, unable to accept the fact that their lover was injured, collected Cerces' scattered bodies, intending to weave them together with threads to bring them back.

t_ch: 二人曾经的眷属们也自发加入了这场苦旅，它们便是创生若虫。其中美丽且脆弱的属于墨涅塔，勇武且刚强的属于瑟希斯。
t_en: The former followers of the two also voluntarily joined this arduous journey, and they are the Creation Nymphs. The beautiful and fragile belong to Mnestia, while the brave and strong belong to Cerces.

t_ch: 拼凑神的躯体并非易事。若虫们必须体察万物，从众人的言语中搜集智慧与爱，供墨涅塔编织金丝。它们因而拥有一个别称：「织者」。
t_en: Reassembling a divine body is no easy task. The nymph must perceive all things, gathering wisdom and love from the words of others to provide for Mnestia's weaving of the golden threads. Thus, they have an alternate name: "Weavers."

t_ch: 只是这种行为…注定徒劳无获。
t_en: But this act... is destined to be futile.

t_ch: 若虫会如何协助你？
t_en: How does a nymph assist you?

t_ch: 说来话长，若虫们本质上…都曾是生活在黄金世的人类。
t_en: That's a little complicated. In short, nymphs were essentially... human beings who had lived in the Era Chrysea.

t_ch: 在传说中，「浪漫」的信徒会在死后被塞纳托斯送入残茧，蜕生为蝶，继续伴于泰坦们左右。
t_en: Legend has it that Thanatos sent disciples of Romance to defective cocoons, where they were reborn as butterflies, destined to continue their lives as loyal aides to the Titan.

t_ch: 虽然心智犹如孩童，但若虫们确实拥有灵智。也正因墨涅塔与瑟希斯两位泰坦的仁慈，在那个时代，死亡曾经柔软且温暖。
t_en: Though nymphs possess a naive and childlike innocence, they remain sentient and intelligent. In those days, thanks to the benevolence of the two Titans Mnestia and Cerces, death was a gentle and comforting experience.

t_ch: 在业已破碎的当下，若虫们拥有的赐福相当珍贵。倘若将它积沙成塔，将会是一股可观的力量，定能解开最牢固的封印。
t_en: As karma has been severed in the current era, the benediction bestowed upon the nymph becomes incredibly precious. If gathered to form a mountain, these benedictions would hold enough power to break even the most unyielding seal.

t_ch: 它们会同意吗？
t_en: Will they agree to it?

t_ch: 我们都与墨涅塔有着千丝万缕的联系。只要晓之以情，相信它们会愿意出一份力的。毕竟这份预言也和泰坦们有关。
t_en: We are all connected to Mnestia in one way or another. Once the reasons are articulated, I believe many will be eager to contribute. After all, this prophecy concerns the Titans themselves.

t_ch: 征得同意后，我会妥善安置它们的记忆与灵魂，并用金丝将它们的赐福缝补为一…希望这行得通。
t_en: Once I have their approval, I'll arrange for their memories and souls, binding their benedictions together with the golden thread... Let's hope this truly succeeds.

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
t_en: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者重视情谊，不愿与旧友们分离。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽站点的铃铛上</color>，跟每位过路人道别呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who values connections deeply and cannot bear to say goodbye to friends. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the bell of Dromas Station</color>, offering farewells to every passerby.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者不满于美的凋零，总想为人们添加一分亮色。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>某位卫兵的头上</color>，把自己扮成饰品呢。去欣赏一下吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver, unsatisfied with the fading of beauty, who wishes only to add a touch of brightness to others. The golden thread brings tidings: It now resides <color=#dbc291ff>on the head of a certain guard</color>, pretending to be an ornament. Seek it out and admire its glow.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者第一次接触到水，各外兴奋。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>浴场的中央水池</color>里泡澡。贵客可以在沐浴之余顺便去看看。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is exhilarated to touch water for the first time. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the central pool of the baths</color>, reveling in the warmth. My esteemed guest, feel free to take a look when you visit.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者醉心于黄金血的甜美，就像悬锋战士沉迷于蜜酿。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>褔坛的金池中央</color>，似乎有些神志不清了。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is mesmerized by the sweetness of Golden Blood, like a Kremnos Warrior addicted to honey brew. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the center of the Golden Pond at the Altar of Blessings</color>, seemingly disoriented.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者想要把自己锤炼得像山之民一样坚韧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铁匠的火炉上</color>锻炼耐性呢。快让它知难而退吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to be as resilient as the Mountain Dwellers. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff>on the blacksmith's forge</color>, honing their endurance and patience. Hurry and retrieve them before they get in the way.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者想要让世人品尝甜美。金丝带来消息，它正把自己伪装成一块喂食大地兽的红土，你可以在<color=#dbc291ff>大地兽工坊</color>附近找到它。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes for all lives to experience a touch of sweetness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now disguise themselves as a piece of red clay that nourishes the dromas. You may find them near the <color=#dbc291ff>Dromas Workshop</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者通晓各种偏门知识。金丝带来消息，它正藏在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的升降梯井</color>，把自己伪装成了墙壁的一部分。要抓住时机才能见到它。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who possesses knowledge of all unorthodox sorts. The golden thread brings tidings: They now secretly reside <color=#dbc291ff>in the Marmoreal Palace's elevator shaft</color>, disguising themselves as part of the wall. You need to catch the right opportunity to see them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者跃跃欲试、渴望证明自己的速度。金丝带来消息，它正停在<color=#dbc291ff>一张桌子上</color>，等待着挑战者上门呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who jumps at the chance and is eager to prove its speed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>on a table</color>, waiting for new challengers.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者总想成为法吉娜的圣兽。金丝带来消息，它把自己藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的圣兽摊位</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the sacred beast of Phagousa. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide <color=#dbc291ff>within the Sacred Beast Stall in Marmoreal Palace</color>. Seek them there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者向往传说、渴望和英雄们一起冒险。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅壁画上</color>，把自己想象成画中蝶呢。你得擦亮眼睛才能发现它。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns for legends and adventures alongside heroes. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>within a mural</color>, imagining themselves as the butterfly depicted there. Look closely to find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者向往高处、希望像纷争世的帝王那样手握权力。金丝带来消息，它正站在<color=#dbc291ff>俯瞰浴场的高处</color>，发表豪言壮语呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to great heights, longing to wield power like an emperor of Era Bellica. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the peak overlooking the baths</color>, making a bold and watchful statement.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者想要成为雅努斯的祭司，为此潜心修炼。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>看台的环形装饰边上</color>，练习穿墙呢。不知道它能否成功。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who aspires to become a priest of Janus and trains diligently for the role. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>by the ring decorations in the bleachers</color>, practicing the art of wall penetration. I wonder if they have succeeded.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者自诩博古通今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的休息室内</color>锐评一位学者的演讲，你可以去指教一二。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who prides itself on being knowledgeable and insightful. The golden thread brings tidings: They now offer critiques on a scholar's speech <color=#dbc291ff>in the lounge of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you could pick up a few pointers there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者喜好乐理。金丝带来消息，它正和伙伴们于<color=#dbc291ff>云石天宫的水漫琴旁</color>倾听演奏，或许你也可以去听上一曲。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who has a deep love for music theory. The golden thread brings tidings: They now listen intently to a performance <color=#dbc291ff>beside the water harp of Marmoreal Palace</color>. Perhaps you might join them as well.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者渴望完美。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的某根柱子上</color>，把自己伪装成一盏灯，说是要「追求极致」。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who strives for perfection. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lean <color=#dbc291ff>against a certain pillar along the corridor</color>, pretending to be a lamp. They seek to "reach the pinnacle of their aspirations."

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者非常嗜睡。金丝带来消息，它正躺在<color=#dbc291ff>你的私人浴宫</color>内，睡得正香呢。可以试着叫醒它。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is always quite lethargic. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie <color=#dbc291ff>within your private bath chamber</color>, sleeping soundly like a rock. Feel free to try waking them up.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者迎难而上，逆风飞翔。金丝带来消息，它正在挑战<color=#dbc291ff>热水池上空的蒸汽</color>。请让它暂歇兴致吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who rises to the occasion and flies against the wind. The golden thread brings tidings: They now challenge <color=#dbc291ff>the steam above the hot pool</color>. Please ask them to take a break.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者怀念过去，感时伤悲。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>对面不远的花丛中</color>，藏匿于花丛中。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who grows wistful with memories of the past, often touched by quiet sorrow. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie hidden <color=#dbc291ff>within the flower bush opposite, not far from here</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者说要当上雅努斯的祭司。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>悬崖边的护栏上</color>练习穿墙术，可以去检验下它的成果。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to become Janus' priest. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>on the railing at the edge of the cliff</color>, honing their skill in wall penetration. Feel free to go and test the fruits of their practice.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者渴望揭开世界的真相，正在寻找聪明的伙伴。金丝带来消息，它藏身于<color=#dbc291ff>一个隐秘的竹篮内</color>，得擦亮眼睛才能找到。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of unveiling the world's hidden truths and is searching for a clever companion. The golden thread brings tidings: They now conceal themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a secret woven basket</color>. Look closely, and you may discover them.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: I'm not giving it to you.

t_ch: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
t_en: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人无法同时阅读两本书。」
t_en: Thank you, my esteemed guest. But a wise man once said, "No man can read two books at the same time."

t_ch: 眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
t_en: The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.

t_ch: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
t_en: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
t_en: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

t_ch: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
t_en: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

t_ch: 当茧褪去时，一句金色文字组成的话在空中转瞬即逝：「蝴蝶知道一切」。
t_en: As the cocoon falls away, a phrase in shimmering golden letters briefly appears in the air before fading: "Butterflies know everything."

t_ch: 看来织者们是受到了预言的指引…这异样应该就是解开预言的关键。
t_en: It appears the weavers are guided by the prophecies... This unusual phenomenon may well hold the key to unlocking their secrets.

t_ch: 或许它是某种图案？又或者对某个地点的暗示…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
t_en: Could it be an image? Or perhaps a clue to a specific location... If you're intrigued, you can try solving it.

t_ch: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
t_en: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

t_ch: 我找到了这个东西…
t_en: I found something...

t_ch: 这就是那则预言所指向的目标？倒是稀奇。
t_en: So this is what the prophecy was pointing to? How unexpected.

t_ch: 它的边缘还算平整，不像被外力破坏过，更像是有意制作成了这般模样。
t_en: Its edges are relatively smooth and doesn't seem to have been damaged by external force. It appears like it deliberately been made to be this way.

t_ch: 总之，既然是预言的指引，那应该多多益善。先由你保存着吧，贵客。
t_en: In any case, the prophecy has led us here, so this must be of some use. Please, my esteemed guest, keep it first.

t_ch: 我这里还有不少被遮蔽的预言。等全部处理完后，我们再一起研究它背后的深意吧。
t_en: I still have many unsolved prophecies to decipher. Once we've completed them all, we can investigate the deeper meaning behind them.

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_ch: 再见，期待你的好消息。
t_en: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

t_ch: 「蝴蝶知道一切」。
t_en: "Butterflies know everything."

t_ch: 嗯，就这么简单…或许我们把注意力放在这些若虫身上会更好。它们想传达什么呢？
t_en: Yes, it is that easy... Perhaps we should focus on these nymphs. What are they trying to convey?

t_ch: 我找到了许多若虫。
t_en: I have found many nymphs.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们会成为圣城重要的助力。我为你准备了一点薄礼，还请收下。
t_en: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be an invaluable help to the holy city. I have prepared you a small token of my gratitude. Please, take it.

t_ch: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
t_en: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
t_en: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者心慈好善，不愿见旅者误入歧途。金丝带来消息，它正把守在<color=#dbc291ff>一扇紧闭的门扉上</color>，唤它来歇息一会儿吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a kind-hearted weaver who wishes to prevent travelers from straying onto the wrong path. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand guard <color=#dbc291ff>at a tightly closed door</color>. Perhaps you should tell them to take a break.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者决心证明自己的力量，但似乎找错了对象。金丝带来消息，它意图向<color=#dbc291ff>尼卡多利的神龛</color>发起挑战，去看看结果如何吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is determined to prove its strength but has picked the wrong opponent. The golden thread brings tidings: They now seek to challenge <color=#dbc291ff>the shrine of Nikador</color>. Go and witness the outcome.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者苦心经营着一块歇脚地，意图将彼世的智慧传递。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>篝火边</color>等候冒险者的到来，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who diligently tends to a resting place, eager to pass on its wisdom of life. The golden thread brings tidings: They now sit <color=#dbc291ff>by the bonfire</color>, awaiting the arrival of adventurers. Go and seek them out.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者苦心孤诣，执着于解开晦涩的谜题。金丝带来消息，它仍在<color=#dbc291ff>某扇门前的机关上</color>苦苦思索，去助它一臂之力吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is fascinated by the challenge of solving obscure puzzles. The golden thread brings tidings: They now ponder intently <color=#dbc291ff>about the mechanism of a certain door</color>. Perhaps you could lend a hand.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者天真地向壁上浮雕施以援手。金丝带来消息，它正伏在<color=#dbc291ff>墙壁的浮雕上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who naively offers assistance to the frescos on the wall. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>upon the wall relief</color>. Go there and look for them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者气高胆壮，横冲直撞。金丝带来消息，它埋头在<color=#dbc291ff>墙壁上的凹槽中</color>钻出道路，请从咫尺之外的走廊带它回来吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a daring weaver running amok. The golden thread brings tidings: They now bury themselves <color=#dbc291ff>within a groove in the wall</color>, carving out a trail. Please retrieve them from the nearby corridor.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者不惧于向深渊发问。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>横贯深渊的锁链桥梁上</color>向下凝视，控诉霾中之影的恶行…请将它带离险境吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver unafraid to pose questions to the Abyss. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze down <color=#dbc291ff>at the Abyss spanned by a chain bridge</color>, confronting the shadow lurking in the haze... Please bring them out of danger.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者漂泊在外，思乡心切。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>厅堂角落的堆积货箱中</color>等待同伴的消息。去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is wandering and longing for its homeland. The golden thread brings tidings: They now wait for news of their companions <color=#dbc291ff>in the stacked crates in the corner of the hall</color>. Go there and seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者观仰陈迹，不免吊古伤今。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>布满苔藓的巨大雕塑前</color>感慨于过往的岁月，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who gazes at the ruins, mourning both the past and the present. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand before <color=#dbc291ff>the giant statue covered in moss</color>, lamenting the passage of time. Go there and find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者醉心角斗，在赛场看入了迷。金丝带来消息，它在<color=#dbc291ff>角斗场前的火炬上</color>，刚从长眠中醒来，是时候唤它回来了。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who revels in the thrill of brawls and is captivated by watching tournaments. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside on <color=#dbc291ff>the torch in front of the arena</color>, having just awakened from a long sleep. It's time to summon them back.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者思绪严密，渴求完美，看不惯任何苟全之事。金丝带来消息，它和<color=#dbc291ff>壁画里的方块</color>较上了劲，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is meticulous and thirsty for perfection, unwilling to accept anything less. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now caught in a standoff with <color=#dbc291ff>the square in the mural painting</color>. Go there and seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者立志成为预言中的勇者，扫清世上的一切黑暗。金丝带来消息，它正尝试拔出<color=#dbc291ff>某柄传说中的勇者之剑</color>，在那里或许可以觅得它的踪迹。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who dreams of becoming the hero foretold in the prophecy, determined to vanquish all darkness from the world. The golden thread brings tidings: They now strive to pull out <color=#dbc291ff>a legendary Sword of Valor</color>. Perhaps you can find them there.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者生性高洁，一意远离俗世污浊。金丝带来消息，它正躲在一座<color=#dbc291ff>高处的吊灯</color>上，若不借助神迹，怕是难以寻得它的踪迹。
t_en: Hmm... There is a noble-hearted weaver who is resolutely committed to avoiding the world's corruption. The golden thread brings tidings: They now hide on <color=#dbc291ff>a chandelier high above</color>. Without a miracle, it will be difficult to find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者倾心于搜集往世流传的诗篇，常为其中的桥段心潮澎湃。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>蛇头雕塑的口中</color>小憩，不知它是否又有新的见闻？
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver devoted to collecting poems passed down through generations, often touched by their words. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>in the mouth of a serpent-headed statue</color>. I wonder if they have witnessed something new once again.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者有着出类拔萃的雕塑技艺，意图将辉煌岁月的荣光在今日重塑。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一座坍圮的雕像前</color>谋划最新的作品。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver with exceptional sculpting skills who seeks to revive the glory of a bygone era. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>before a collapsed statue</color>, envisioning their latest masterpiece.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者跋山涉水，寻找强健躯体之道。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铸造战甲的高台上</color>，祈求能得到一场酣畅淋漓的锤炼。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who searches high and low for a way to strengthen its body. The golden thread brings tidings: They now pray <color=#dbc291ff>on a platform where the war armors were forged</color>, hoping to undergo a profound refinement.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者周游世界，记录着各城邦昔日的风俗人情。金丝带来消息，它正考察<color=#dbc291ff>色彩不同的盾牌壁饰</color>，听听它有何发现吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who travels the world, documenting the customs of ancient cities. The golden thread brings tidings: They now examine <color=#dbc291ff>vibrant shield wall ornaments of various hues</color>. Listen closely to the discoveries they have made.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者深信散落世间的残存神性对苦修大有裨益。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>天谴之锋的剑锋下</color>冥思苦想…或许它能有新的领悟？
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who believes that the remnants of divinity scattered across the world hold great power for asceticism. The golden thread brings tidings: They now meditate <color=#dbc291ff>under the Blade of Fury</color>... Maybe a new realization is unfolding?

t_ch: 嗯…有位忠心耿耿的织者仍无法释怀当年的悲剧。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一幅绘制战甲的壁画上</color>追忆当初，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a loyal weaver who remains haunted by a past tragedy. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze <color=#dbc291ff>upon a mural depicting war armors</color>, lost in memories of that fateful day. Go there and seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者勇于直面自己的恐惧，潜入英雄与众神纷争的最前线。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>铸魂区门前</color>探听消息，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who confronts their fears head-on, venturing into the front lines of the heroes' struggle against the gods. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gather information <color=#dbc291ff>in front of the Soul-Forging Zone's doors</color>. Go there and look for them.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: I'm not giving it to you.

t_ch: 嗯…如果没有记忆残晶，衣匠是无法提供协助的——就连大地兽都不会饿着肚子工作。之后再来吧，贵客。
t_en: Hmm... The Garmentmaker cannot provide their services if you have no Memory Crystal Shards... Not even a dromas will work if they are left hungry. Come again another time, dear customer.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。但曾有贤者说过这样一句话：「人无法同时阅读两本书。」
t_en: Thank you, my esteemed guest. But a wise man once said, "No man can read two books at the same time."

t_ch: 眼下衣匠已经为你揭露了一只若虫的位置。在找到它之前，其他若虫的信息就暂且保密吧。
t_en: The Garmentmaker has already revealed the location of one nymph to you. Until you find it, the whereabouts of the other nymphs will remain a secret.

t_ch: 我找齐了这里的全部若虫。
t_en: I have gathered all the nymphs here.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客。现在，我会着手解封众多预言中的一则。
t_en: Thank you, esteemed guest. And now, I shall begin to unfurl one of the many prophecies.

t_ch: 金丝在人台周围凝聚，构成了一个包裹它身体的茧。
t_en: The golden thread solidifies around the mannequin, creating a cocoon that envelops it.

t_ch: 当茧褪去时，唯余一块金丝织成的锦缎漂浮在空中。衣匠伸手一挥，它便分作两半，其中一半飞进了你的手里……
t_en: When the cocoon falls away, only a piece of brocade woven by golden threads is left floating in the air. With a wave of the Garmentmaker's hand, it splits in two, one half flying into your hand...

t_ch: 奇怪……
t_en: This is odd...

t_ch: 这块金织上确实有字，但每一句都断断续续、像是被污泥糊住了似的，根本不具备可读性。
t_en: Surely, the golden fabric is adorned with words, yet each sentence appears fragmented as if muddied by sludge. They are completely unreadable.

t_ch: 嗯…我以前倒也见过这样的预言。它就像一块分裂成两半的陶片，必须拼凑完整才能解读。
t_en: Yes... I have encountered a prophecy like this before. It resembles a shard of pottery that has split in half, requiring it to be pieced together to reveal its true meaning.

t_ch: 这份预言应该还有另一份残本…如果你有兴趣的话，不妨也试着解读看看。
t_en: There should be another remnant of this prophecy... If you're interested, you might want to try to interpret it yourself as well.

t_ch: 再次感谢你的协助，贵客。
t_en: Thank you once again for your aid, esteemed guest.

t_ch: 能复述下预言的内容吗？
t_en: Can you repeat the prophecy?

t_ch: 眼下这份预言还不完整，得把它的另一半找出来才行。
t_en: This prophecy is incomplete. We need to find its other half to uncover the full message.

t_ch: 我去忙了。
t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_ch: 再见，期待你的好消息。
t_en: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

t_ch: 我找到了许多若虫。
t_en: I have found many nymphs.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客，织者们在圣城会过得很愉快的。这些礼物就权当报酬收下吧。
t_en: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. The weavers will be very happy living in the holy city. Take these gifts as your payment.

t_ch: 风儿顺着金丝捎来了你的消息。贵客，可有什么进展吗？
t_en: The winds riding on golden threads bring tidings of your situation. Esteemed guest, has there been any progress?

t_ch: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
t_en: Where are the remaining nymphs?

t_ch: 衣匠能顺着金丝找到它们的踪迹，但这需要消耗<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>才能做到。
t_en: The Garmentmaker can follow the golden thread to ascertain their whereabouts, but consumes <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color> in order to do so.

t_ch: 提供「记忆残晶」。
t_en: Provide Memory Crystal Shards.

t_ch: 衣匠一把抓住记忆残晶，顷刻炼化。
t_en: The Garmentmaker grabs the shards and instantly refines them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者精通把棋子连成线的技术。金丝带来消息，它正在某面<color=#dbc291ff>布满盾牌的墙上</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver skilled in the art of aligning chess pieces. The golden thread brings tidings: They now gaze <color=#dbc291ff>at a wall adorned with shields</color>. Go there and seek them out.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者渴望踏上传奇的旅途。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>走廊的环形轨道上</color>，干劲满满地向前爬着。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who yearns to embark on a legendary journey. The golden thread brings tidings: They now diligently crawl <color=#dbc291ff>along the circular track of the corridor</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者年老且睿智。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>城外桥梁的尽头</color>，目送出征的战士们远去。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who gets wiser with age. The golden thread brings tidings: They now observe the warriors departing <color=#dbc291ff>at the far end of the bridge outside the city</color>.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者崇尚公平。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>楼梯的侧面</color>，以身为砝码，确保两侧的对称与公平。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who upholds the value of fairness. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>at the side of the stairs</color>, their form stretched out as a scale, balancing symmetry and ensuring fairness on both sides.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者满腔怒火，想要向尼卡多利发起挑战。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>一座剑之神龛下</color>，挥舞自己的双颚呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver consumed by fury, eager to challenge Nikador. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>beneath a sword shrine</color>, their jaws agape, ready to strike.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者想要挑战天空。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>雕像装饰物的顶端</color>，打算靠自己的翅膀飞起来…它多半会失败的。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who wishes to challenge the sky. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>on top of the statue's ornament</color>, yearning to soar on their wings... though they are likely to falter.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者通晓时间的哲理。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>覆盖靛石碎片的通路尽头</color>，等待着洞见真实的机会。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who understands the philosophy of time. The golden thread brings tidings: They now reside <color=#dbc291ff> at the end of the pathway covered with indigo fragments</color>, patiently awaiting the moment to unveil the truth.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者性格自卑，无法和同类玩耍。金丝带来消息，它正在一座<color=#dbc291ff>倒地的雕像前</color>，把雕像当成自己的好朋友。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who has low self-esteem and can't play with its kind. The golden thread brings tidings: They now seek comfort <color=#dbc291ff>before a fallen statue</color>, as if the statue were their closest friend.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者非常喜欢火焰。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>有岩浆流下的露天平台边缘</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is drawn to the flames. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of an open-air platform, where the lava flows endlessly</color>. Go there and find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者对建筑的设计非常挑剔。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>着火的陷坑旁边</color>，琢磨着怎么过去呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver with a keen eye for architectural flaws. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>next to the burning pit</color>, contemplating the best way to navigate their fiery depths.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者对尼卡多利甚是崇拜。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>中央雕像的剑柄上</color>耀武扬威呢。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who admires Nikador. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>at the hilt of the sword on the central statue</color> in a display of strength.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者似乎对已经灭绝的生物颇有兴趣。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>牛头雕像的面部</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver with a fascination for extinct creatures. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie low <color=#dbc291ff>on the face of a bull's head statue</color>. Go there and seek it out.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者执意要把铁球推上高坡。金丝带来消息，它在<color=#dbc291ff>长长的楼梯边缘</color>，重复着徒劳的工作。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who insists on pushing the iron balls up the steep hill. The golden thread brings tidings: They now toil <color=#dbc291ff>on the edge of a long staircase</color>, endlessly repeating the fruitless task.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者喜欢乘坐雅努斯秘径。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一座秘径装置旁边</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who is captivated by Janus's Hidden Passage. The golden thread brings tidings: They now rest <color=#dbc291ff>beside a concealed path device</color>. Go there to seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者享受被碾压的感觉。金丝带来消息，它正在亲手设计的<color=#dbc291ff>滚石机关旁边</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver with an unusual fondness for the sensation of being crushed. The golden thread brings tidings: They now stand <color=#dbc291ff>beside a rolling stone mechanism</color> of their own design. Go there to seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者懂得许多隐秘故事。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>掘石场的平台边缘</color>，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who knows many hidden stories. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the Excavation Ground</color>. Go there to seek them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者热爱与人游戏。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>掘石场的大门外</color>，和一群眷属玩木头人游戏，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver who loves playing games with humans. The golden thread brings tidings: They now linger <color=#dbc291ff>at the entrance of the Excavation Ground</color>, playing "Red Light, Green Light" with a group of Titankin. Go there to find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者善于把控产品质量。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>琢石区的平台边缘</color>清点数量，指挥一座雕像的建成，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver skilled in quality control. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now doing an inventory check <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the platform in the Chisel Zone</color>, overseeing the precise construction of a statue. Head there to locate them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者精通计算。金丝带来消息，它正在<color=#dbc291ff>一座靛石堆顶</color>清点数量，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver expert in computation. The golden thread brings tidings: They are now stocktaking <color=#dbc291ff>at the top of an indigo stone pile</color>. Head there to find them.

t_ch: 嗯…有位织者经历了可怕的幻象。金丝带来消息，它正趴在<color=#dbc291ff>断桥旁的走廊边缘</color>，心有余悸呢，去那里找找看吧。
t_en: Hmm... There is a weaver haunted by terrifying illusions. The golden thread brings tidings: They now lie quietly <color=#dbc291ff>at the edge of the corridor near a broken bridge</color>, seemingly shadowed by lingering fears. Go there and find them.

t_ch: 不给~
t_en: I'm not giving it to you.

t_en: I'll get back to work.

t_en: Goodbye, I await good news from you.

t_ch: 我找到了许多若虫。
t_en: I have found many nymphs.

t_ch: 多谢你了，贵客，我会请织者们去圣城休整。收下我为你准备的这些礼物吧。
t_en: Thank you so much, esteemed guest. I will invite the weavers to go to the holy city for recovery. Please take these gifts that I have prepared for you.

t_ch: <size=28>出现了，喀嚓大魔王！</size>
t_en: <size=28>The Crrkin' Demon King hath cometh!</size>

t_ch: 上前来吧，勇士，觐见掌管黑暗的喀嚓大魔王，面对我！
t_en: Come forth, warrior, pay your respects to the Crrkin' Demon King that rules darkness, and face me!

t_ch: 桀桀桀…不对，喀喀喀——预言的使者终于还是来到了这里吗？
t_en: Kekee... No wait, crrrkkk... Has the messenger of the prophecy finally arrived after all?

t_ch: 那便回答我吧——在烈阳熄灭的地方，曾经万人瞩目的会场上，如今有多少火焰仍在燃烧？
t_en: Answer me this then — in the place extinguished of the fiery sun, on the stage once watched by thousands, how many flames still burn bright?
Five flames.
Nine flames.

t_ch: <unbreak>11</unbreak>盆。
t_en: Eleven flames.

t_ch: <unbreak>13</unbreak>盆。
t_en: Thirteen flames.

t_ch: 全部熄灭了。
t_en: They've all been extinguished.

t_ch: 错了！——答案就摆在荣耀的平台之上喀。
t_en: Wrong! The answer lies above the stage of glory, crrk.

t_ch: 不细心的人就该受到惩罚。交回悬锋战士的称号，从新兵开始重新练起吧喀！
t_en: Those who do not pay attention to detail should be punished. Return the title of Kremnos Warrior, and begin your training anew as a recruit, crrk!

t_ch: 是啊，你已知晓火焰的真谛…啊，火焰，它还能燃烧多久呢喀？
t_en: Yes, you already know the essence of flame... Ah, flame, how long still will it burn, crrk?

t_ch: 你证明了自己的力量——任何若虫都无法比拟，我会为你让路。
t_en: You have proven your strength. No nymph is your equal, I will open the path for you.

t_ch: 你练级回来了？那便回答我吧——在烈阳熄灭的地方，曾经万人瞩目的会场上，如今有多少火焰仍在燃烧？
t_en: You're back from your training? Answer me this then — in the place extinguished of the fiery sun, on the stage once watched by thousands, how many flames still burn bright?
Five flames.
Nine flames.

t_ch: <unbreak>11</unbreak>盆。
t_en: Eleven flames.

t_ch: 吼吼，要向我走过来吗…
t_en: Hoho, you dare approach me...?

t_ch: 伴随着一串奇怪的笑声，一只若虫从阴影中现出了身形。
t_en: With a strange laughing sound, a nymph appears from the shadows.

t_ch: 是谁打扰了我的安眠……
t_en: Who dares disrupt my slumber...

t_ch: 看来又得接待客人了，先打理下我的触角喀……
t_en: More visitors again, let me tidy up my horns first, crrk...

t_ch: 喀喀——都过去这么久了，居然还有人想要踏上求索之路……
t_en: Crrrkkk... Long has it been, yet there are still some who wish to tread the path of discovery...

t_ch: 先回答我一个问题吧，年轻人：在纷争的剑锋之下，总共有多少位勇士追随着持矛君王？
t_en: Answer this one question then, youngling: Under the blades of Strife, how many warriors followed the lance-wielding king in total?
Four warriors.
Six warriors.
Nine warriors.

t_ch: <unbreak>15</unbreak>位。
t_en: Fifteen warriors.

t_ch: 我怎么知道？
t_en: How would I know?

t_ch: 不要灰心，年轻人，仔细观察——答案就藏在阳光照耀不到的地方。
t_en: Fret not, youngling, and watch carefully — the answer is hidden where no sun may shine.

t_ch: …没错，愿荣耀与你同在喀。
t_en: ...Correct. May glory be with you, crrk.

t_ch: 年轻人，想好答案了吗？在纷争的剑锋之下，总共有多少位勇士追随着持矛君王？

Four warriors.
Six warriors.
Nine warriors.

t_ch: <unbreak>15</unbreak>位。
t_en: Fifteen warriors.

t_ch: 我怎么知道？
t_en: How would I know?

t_ch: 不要灰心，年轻人，仔细观察——答案就藏在阳光照耀不到的地方。
t_en: Fret not, youngling, and watch carefully — the answer is hidden where no sun may shine.

t_ch: …没错，愿荣耀与你同在喀。
t_en: ...Correct. May glory be with you, crrk.

t_ch: 勇士们都去哪了…
t_en: Where have all the warriors gone...?

t_ch: 伴随着悉悉索索的声音，一只若虫从角落里爬出。
t_en: With a rustling sound, a nymph crawls out from the corner.

t_ch: 哎哟——投降，投降！再扯下去，我们兄弟俩就要骨肉分离了。
t_en: Ahh — I surrender, I surrender! If you keep pulling like that, we'll be split apart!

t_ch: 您这一手拨转时针的手艺越发纯熟了，难怪欧洛尼斯它老人家对您青睐有加呀。
t_en: You're getting better and better at turning time back. It's no wonder that old Oronyx is keen on you!

t_ch: 桀桀…不过，把才华浪费在正道上实在可惜，您有没有兴趣和我合作合作？
t_en: Hehe... It would be such a shame to waste your talents on the right path. Would you be interested in a little collaboration?

t_ch: 怎么个合作法？
t_en: What kind of collaboration?

t_ch: 敝人虽不才，可「神偷」的名头还是远近闻名的。您要是入伙，一定不会为今天的下注后悔。
t_en: Though I may not have your talents, my reputation as the Master Thief is still known far and wide. Joining us would be a bet you wouldn't regret...

t_ch: 不会和你同流合污！
t_en: I would never associate with the likes of you!

t_ch: 塔兰顿的法槌落下尚需时间呢，您先听我一言再做判断吧~
t_en: It will take some time for the gavel of Talanton to fall. Why not hear me out before you make your decision?

t_ch: 把我的宝箱还来！
t_en: Give me back my chest!

t_ch: 盯着眼前的蝇头小利，难免会因小失大，您先听我一言再做判断吧~
t_en: If you obsess over your small losses, you are sure to lose sight of the greater gains. Why not hear me out before you make your decision?

t_ch: 桀桀，看到街角的裁缝铺了吧？那间铺子里摆着个古董花瓶，只可惜人来人往，不好下手。
t_en: Hehe, you see the tailor's shop on the corner? There's an antique vase in there. Unfortunately, the foot traffic is high in there, and it's tough to get a moment to strike.

t_ch: 但您只需动动手指，把时针拨回某个静寂无人的深夜，我就能大摇大摆地走进去，把它轻而易举地取出来——
t_en: But all you would need to do is waggle that little finger of yours, turn the clock back to a quiet evening with no one around, and I can walk right in and snap it up with ease...

t_ch: 这花瓶很值钱吗？
t_en: Is this vase valuable?

t_ch: 听了也是脏耳朵…
t_en: Just listening to that made my ears feel dirty.

t_ch: 您先别急，我还没说完呢！
t_en: Don't be so hasty. I haven't finished!

t_ch: 然后，您去古董店卖掉花瓶。趁着老板将它端进库房的功夫，我会偷偷溜进去，神不知鬼不觉地取出一本账本——
t_en: Then, you take the vase to an antique store to sell it. When the boss turns around to put it away in the warehouse, I will sneak in and grab their accounting book before anyone is any the wiser...

t_ch: 这账本也值钱吗？
t_en: Is the accounting book valuable, too?

t_ch: 都进库房了， 你就拿这个？
t_en: If you're already in the warehouse, is that really all you're going to take?

t_ch: 这可不是寻常账本！里边夹着一张旧地契，签署时间是泰坦纷争前更早的年岁，当时奥赫玛还是一片野地呢。
t_en: This is no simple accounting book! There is an old land deed stashed in there that was signed even before the war of the Titans, back when Okhema was no more than wilderness.

t_ch: 划定的范围，说出来您可别吓到——正是刻法勒现在的立足之处！
t_en: As for the demarcated area... Don't let this shock you... But it is the current location of Kephale themself!

t_ch: 凭着这张地契，我们就能名正言顺地声索黎明机器的所有权。到时候我们说白天就是白天，我们说晚上，就马上两眼一抹黑！谁想晒到光，都得向我们乖乖交钱。
t_en: With this land deed, we will have a legitimate right to claim ownership of the Dawn Device. Then, when we say day, the sun will be high in the sky. When we say night, the world will fall dark before your eyes! If anyone wants to see the light of the sun, they will have to pay us a fair fee!

t_ch: 桀桀桀…到时候，我就把整条街买下来，想偷哪家偷哪家。您呢，想举会儿黎明机器玩也行~
t_en: Hehehe... When that time comes, I will buy this entire street and steal from any house I want. As for you? If you wanted to hold the Dawn Device for a bit to play, that would be perfectly fine~

t_ch: 我不想举…
t_en: I don't want to hold it...

t_ch: 事成之后我七你三。
t_en: I'm taking <unbreak>70%</unbreak>.

t_ch: 您、您这心比我还黑啊！再怎么说，主意也是我出的吧？
t_en: Y—You're even worse than I am! This whole thing was my idea!

t_ch: 根本就没有什么地契吧？
t_en: This land deed doesn't even exist, I bet?

t_ch: 嘁，话不投机半句多。我说得口干舌燥，结果都是白费功夫。你就拿着这宝箱自己乐呵去吧，回见！
t_en: Tsk, this conversation is going nowhere. My throat is all hoarse from talking, and for what? Just take your darned chest and enjoy it yourself. Later!

t_ch: 呕…这种天旋地转的感觉…太糟糕了！
t_en: Bleh... I feel like the ground is spinning... I feel so sick!

t_ch: 刻法勒在上，我这把老骨头啊…祭司说我八百八十四岁必有一劫，莫非就是今天？
t_en: Kephale above. I am just an old man... The priest said that I would go through an ordeal when I was <unbreak>884</unbreak> years old... Could this be the day?

t_ch: 孩子，你抓错人了。我不是那位大名鼎鼎、身怀绝技的「贼灵」巴特鲁斯，而是老巴特，一个不起眼的搬运工。奉元老院之命，我来搬走这个宝箱。
t_en: Child, you have the wrong man. I am not the infamous Spirithief Bartholos. My name is Old Bart, a mere porter. I have come to move this chest on the orders of the Council of Elders.

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，别装了！
t_en: Quit pretending, Bartholos!

t_ch: 我俩确实很像，你把我认成它也情有可原。
t_en: We do indeed look similar. I can understand how you could mistake us...

t_ch: 元老院雇佣老年人士？
t_en: The Council of Elders is hiring elderly workers?

t_ch: 大敌当前，我自然也想为奥赫玛出一份力啊。
t_en: With the enemy at our gates, I naturally also wish to do my part for Okhema.

t_ch: 孩子，我知道你不相信我。好在时间还很充裕，有什么问题，你大可以问个明白。
t_en: Child, you do not believe me. I can understand that. Fortunately, we have plenty of time. If you have any questions, please feel free to ask.

t_ch: 关于你的长相…
t_en: About your looks...

t_ch: 瑟希斯的造物们共享着同一套生命的质素，世上相似的奇美拉不可计数，精灵有一两只撞脸也很正常。
t_en: The creations of Cerces share common elements in life. Countless chimeras resemble each other, just as it is common for a spirit or two to look alike.

t_ch: 关于你的工作…
t_en: About your job...

t_ch: 当年我是个游荡荒野的孤魂野鬼，是元老们收留了我。他们看我手脚麻利，便让我担负起了「搬运工」的职责。
t_en: Back then, I was a lonely shade that roamed the wilderness. It was the elders that took me in. Seeing that I was fast of foot and deft with my hands, they allowed me to take on the duty of "porter."

t_ch: 关于突然出现…
t_en: About your sudden appearance...

t_ch: 大庭广众之下，怎么可能有宝箱等着你去打开？正因这是元老们的财物，大家才不敢轻举妄动。我是看你要逾越公民的界限，这才及时出手制止。
t_en: Why would there be a chest just sitting around waiting for you to open it in a public place? No one dares to blindly interfere with it because it is the property of the elders. You were going to cross the line for a citizen, so I rushed to stop you.

t_ch: 已经可以做出判断了。
t_en: The truth is clear as day.

t_ch: 枉我兢兢业业，竟然一把年纪还遭此横祸。要不你给我道个歉，这事就算结了！
t_en: I put my everything into my work, and you still give an old man like me a hard time! Why don't you apologize to me and we'll call this settled!

t_ch: 对不住了，老人家！
t_en: Sorry, old man!

t_ch: 「对不住了，老人家~」
t_en: "Sorry, old man~"

t_ch: 桀桀桀，要把咱头都给笑掉了！
t_en: Hehehe, I'm gonna laugh my head off!

t_ch: 唉！骗子不怕碰见恶棍，也不怕碰见同行。只怕遇见你这样的小鬼，天真得像只云羊，白亏了我精心设计的圈套。
t_en: Let me tell you! A trickster isn't scared of villains or fellow deceivers. What they're really scared of is punks like you! Naïve little sheep that waste all the effort we put into our traps!

t_ch: 我连宝箱也不好意思拿了…下次可别那么容易上当受骗！
t_en: Taking this chest doesn't even feel right anymore... Do us a favor and try not to get tricked so easily next time!

t_ch: 巴特鲁斯，你又在扯谎！
t_en: Bartholos, you're lying again!

t_ch: 桀桀桀，您倒是挺警觉的。不过这番世道，有谁不在说谎呢？刻法勒要是会说话，保不住也会撒下弥天大谎呢！
t_en: Hehehe, you're pretty alert, huh? But in this life we live, is there anyone that isn't lying? If Kephale could talk, they'd be the biggest swindler of all!

t_ch: 宝箱您自己收着吧，我们下回再会！
t_en: Take the chest. We'll meet again!

t_ch: 原、原来这是您家？
t_en: S—So this is your home?

t_ch: 上次踩点时这里还空置着，艾格勒没来得及眨几回眼，您就搬进来了。我刚刚参观了一圈，实在是，实在是——
t_en: It was completely vacant the last time I was here. You were moved in before Aquila could blink. I just came to take a look around and honestly, honestly—

t_ch: 有邀请过你来吗？
t_en: Did I invite you here?

t_ch: 哈哈，很豪华吧？
t_en: Haha, isn't it luxurious?

t_ch: 实在是太奢靡了！这里纸醉金迷的气息，让我感到恶心！
t_en: It's far too extravagant in here! The stench of its opulence and lavishness makes me sick!

t_ch: 我风里来雨里去的时候，你们竟然住着别墅，喝着蜜酿，舒舒坦坦地过着好日子？
t_en: While I was making my way through wind and rain, you were here living it up in a mansion, throwing back ambrosia, and living the good life?

t_ch: 更可恨的是，坐拥如此富丽堂皇的屋子，竟然还为了个宝箱和咱过不去…您牙缝里漏下来一些，够我吃穿用度一整年了。
t_en: What is even more loathsome is that you live in such radiant luxury and would still squabble with me over a mere chest... Just the excess that leaks from the gaps in your teeth would keep me clothed and fed for a whole year.

t_ch: 世间还有公道吗？还有正义吗？还有法律吗？塔兰顿要是知道这回事，都要泣不成声了！
t_en: Is there any fairness in this world? Is there any justice? Are there no laws anymore? If Talanton knew of this, they would burst into tears!

t_ch: 塔兰顿才不管这个。
t_en: Talanton has no interest in this.

t_ch: 塔兰顿管不管不要紧，我是管定了——桀桀，敢拦在我的面前，就准备付出代价！
t_en: I don't care if Talanton has no interest, but my interest is fixed now! Hehe. If you dare stand in my way, you'd best be prepared to pay the price!

t_ch: 你想住的话，随时可以来。
t_en: If you want to stay here, you can come whenever you please.

t_ch: 诶？嗯…真的假的？我也不是那么随便的…等等，你不会是在拿我消遣吧？
t_en: Huh? Uh... Are you serious? I'm not so free and easy as to just... Wait a minute. Are you making fun of me?

t_ch: 从来只有我取笑别人，还没人敢拿我取乐——桀桀，准备付出代价吧！
t_en: I'm the one that makes fun of others. No one has ever done it to me before... Hehe, you will pay for this!

t_ch: 下回出门最好记得锁门！不然，有你好看！
t_en: Next time you leave the house, remember to lock the door! Otherwise, you'll just see what happens!

t_ch: 先住手——今天我得说说您。我巴特鲁斯的行窃生涯里，还是头回见您这样的人。
t_en: Stop for a moment... I have to tell you something about you. In all of my years of thievery, I have never met someone like you.

t_ch: 这既不是价值连城的珠宝，也不是稀世罕见的古物。一个装着破烂的宝箱，竟然也拼了命不肯撒手……
t_en: This is not some kind of precious jewel or rare artifact. It's just some chest filled with junk, and yet you would still fight this hard to keep your greedy mitts on it...

t_ch: 您生活这么拮据吗，什么东西都要往口袋里塞？
t_en: Are you so hard pressed that you just go around shoving everything you find in your greedy little pockets?

t_ch: 我自有妙用。
t_en: I have my own use for it.

t_ch: 竟然如此坚定，看来您也是同道中人啊！
t_en: That resolute determination. I see that we are of the same mind!

t_ch: 桀桀桀——您要是看到我的收藏，一定会五体投地，然后乖乖让开。
t_en: Hehehe... If you saw my collection, you would throw yourself to the ground in reverence and get out of my way.

t_ch: 到我嘴里都是肉！
t_en: If it's up for grabs, I'm taking it!

t_ch: 唔…原来您是抱着这样的信念在收集破烂吗？
t_en: Uh... So that's the conviction that keeps you collecting trash?

t_ch: 桀桀桀——这样贪心的想法，扎格列斯老祖听了，都不惜得抬抬它那高傲的眼皮！
t_en: Hehehe... Even the great Zagreus wouldn't bat an eyelid at such a greedy attitude!

t_ch: 我们俩几天没吃饭，都已经饿脱相了。今天正打算拿这虫子打打牙祭，无论如何，都不会拱手相让。
t_en: We haven't eaten for days. We're absolutely starving! This thing is a feast to us. I'm not letting go no matter what!

t_ch: 本以为在这么曲里拐弯的地方，除了那个人之外没人能抓住我……
t_en: I thought they were the only person who would be able to catch me in a place so full of twists and turns...

t_ch: 您的手段还真了不得呀，不知道能不能把「她」也抓住呢，桀桀桀！
t_en: Your methods are remarkable indeed! I wonder if you could capture "her," too... Hehehe!

t_ch: 哎呦，我说是谁呢，竟然闯进如此人迹罕至的地方。是您的话，也就不奇怪了。
t_en: Oh, I was wondering who could have broken into such an uninhabited place. I guess seeing you here, it all makes sense.

t_ch: 宇宙街溜子，正是在下。
t_en: The universal street rat, at your service.

t_ch: 你来得我就来不得？
t_en: You're allowed to be here, but I'm not?

t_ch: 您要是来得早一些，看到的就不是这幅萧条颓败的模样了。我常来的那段时日，可真是热闹非凡啊！
t_en: If you had come sooner, this place would not be so desolate and bleak. I used to come here all the time when this place was all the rage!

t_ch: 诸邦的勇士云集祭典，肉搏、拳击、斗兽、投枪…以搏杀换取荣誉，争夺胜者的冠冕，以及尼卡多利的赐福。
t_en: Warriors from all over would gather for great ceremonies and engage in hand-to-hand combat, boxing, beast fighting, spear throwing... They would battle for glory with their lives, vying for the winner's crown and the benediction of Nikador.

t_ch: 「投枪扎入大地，泥土啜饮奠品」，吟游诗人将战士们的厮杀编入韵文，可惜盛况早已不再，歌谣现下也鲜有听到了。
t_en: "Cast your spear into the earth and feed the soil its libations." Bards and poets compiled songs of the warriors' battles to the death. Unfortunately, this prosperity has long since passed, and these songs are rarely heard anymore.

t_ch: 桀桀，当年兽牢疏忽，斗兽群涌入斗技场。身无利器战士们束手无策，敝人毫不忌惮，挺身将它们一一捉拿，也因此得到尊称「执牛角的勇士」。
t_en: Hehe. Once, the beast cage broke and the beasts flooded into the arena. The unarmed warriors were completely helpless. However, I had no fear and single-handedly caught them all one-by-one. That's where I got the title: "The Horned Warrior."

t_ch: 就你这小身板？
t_en: With that sprout body of yours?

t_ch: 有点太离奇了…
t_en: Now that's a little farfetched...

t_ch: 什么，您竟然不信？！看来我非得和您较量一番不可了！
t_en: What? You don't believe me!? Looks like I'm going to have to prove my strength to you!

t_ch: 呃啊！您的风采，能和当年的悬锋勇士相媲美了！
t_en: Ack! You fight just like the Kremnos warriors of the past!

t_ch: 好吧…刚才我讲的故事，的确和事实有一些微妙的不同。其实是敝人打开兽牢的大门，把斗兽群赶进了竞技场，还顺手偷走了角斗士的武器。
t_en: Fine... I did take some creative liberty in the story I told you... It was actually me who opened the beast cage and herded the beasts into the arena. Then, I stole the gladiators' weapons while I was at it.

t_ch: 不过，那场角斗着实是精彩绝伦！观众席摩肩接踵，欢声雷动…想必尼卡多利那傻大个也乐得歆享这分乐趣吧。
t_en: Although, it was a truly brilliant battle! The audience was packed with people all roaring and shouting... I bet that great buffoon Nikador enjoyed the show a lot, too.

t_ch: 唉，到此为止吧。宝箱您尽管拿去，我今天没有和您争抢的心情。
t_en: Ah, I've had enough. Just take the chest. I'm not in the mood to fight with you today.

t_ch: 好像欧洛尼斯一时兴起，用帷幕遮蔽了我天赋的灵光。昨天我出门时，竟然破天荒地暴露了行踪。现在又遇上你…看来今天也没指望了。
t_en: It feels as if Oronyx themself has cast a curtain to eclipse the bright light of my talents. Yesterday, when I left the house, I accidentally exposed my location for the first time ever. Meeting you now... It looks like any hope for today being any better is gone, too...

t_ch: 昨天的事，说来实在蹊跷。
t_en: Honestly, there's something fishy about what went down yesterday...

t_ch: 近来传闻奥赫玛出现了个「神偷」，风头隐隐有压过我之势。为了给扎格列斯老祖挣点颜面，我决心干票大的重整旗鼓。
t_en: Rumor has it that there's a "master thief" that's been running around recently, whose reputation seems to be threatening my own. So, I decided I'd do something big and restore glory to the great name of Zagreus.

t_ch: 所以我苦思冥想，应该偷些什么，才能彰显我的高超技艺呢？
t_en: So, I racked my brain trying to decide what I should steal to show off my amazing talents.

t_ch: 大浴场的搓澡巾？
t_en: Bath towels from the public baths?

t_ch: 您看我这玲珑剔透的肤质，有必要用那不便之物吗？
t_en: Look at my flawless, delicate skin. You think I have use for something so crude?

t_ch: 阿格莱雅的人台？
t_en: Aglaea's mannequin?

t_ch: 呃…咱就算状态不佳，理智也还在，没必要去触这个霉头。
t_en: Oof... I may be in bad shape, but I still have some sense! There's no need to be getting mixed up in something like that.

t_ch: 刻法勒背上的黎明机器？
t_en: The Dawn Device on Kephale's back?

t_ch: 那玩意儿我早就偷过，现在只是借放在刻法勒肩上罢了。
t_en: I stole that thing ages ago. I'm just borrowing Kephale's shoulder to house it for the moment.

t_ch: 您铁定想不到——我打算偷走元老院大殿的拱心石，让整座殿堂轰然倒塌！
t_en: You'll never guess it... I am planning to steal the keystone from the main hall of the Council of Elders. I'll bring that entire hall crashing to the ground!
